originalAlarm.description: The value written to `&__val_1882` is never used.

sanitizedDescription: The value written to `&val` is never used.
presenceCondition:
(let ((a!1 (or (and __STRICT_ANSI__ (not ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_CONF))
               (and (and __STRICT_ANSI__ ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_CONF)
                    (not ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_RENAME))
               (and (and (and __STRICT_ANSI__ ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_CONF)
                         ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_RENAME)
                    (not ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_RENAME_REGEXP))))
      (a!3 (and (and (and (not __STRICT_ANSI__) ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_CONF)
                     ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_RENAME)
                (not ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_RENAME_REGEXP)))
      (a!5 (and (and (and (not __STRICT_ANSI__) ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_CONF)
                     ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_RENAME)
                ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_RENAME_REGEXP)))
(let ((a!2 (and a!1
                (and (and (and __STRICT_ANSI__ ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_CONF)
                          ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_RENAME)
                     (not ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_RENAME_REGEXP))))
      (a!4 (or (and (not __STRICT_ANSI__) (not ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_CONF))
               (and (and (not __STRICT_ANSI__) ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_CONF)
                    (not ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_RENAME))
               a!3)))
  (or a!2
      (and (and (and __STRICT_ANSI__ ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_CONF)
                ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_RENAME)
           ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_RENAME_REGEXP)
      (and a!4 a!3)
      a!5)))
model:
(define-fun __STRICT_ANSI__ () Bool
  true)
(define-fun ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_CONF () Bool
  true)
(define-fun ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_RENAME () Bool
  true)
(define-fun ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_RENAME_REGEXP () Bool
  false)
reasoning: b62bd7b261b.c L16: 'val = (s && s[1]) ? s+1 : NULL;' — the new value assigned to val at L16 is never subsequently read. Inside #ifdef MDEV_RENAME_REGEXP, 's = a' uses 'a' (L21), not val; and outside REGEXP, val is not used at all after L16. Genuine dead store. PC simplifies to ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_CONF AND ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_RENAME (STRICT_ANSI terms fully cancel, MDEV_RENAME_REGEXP terms cancel). This exactly captures the scope where L16 exists (#ifdef MDEV_CONF / #ifdef MDEV_RENAME). No restrictive library macros remain. New bug, correctly constrained PC.
